full_text:
Guanqiu Dian (Zibang) 毌丘甸 (子邦)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guanqiu Dian (毌丘甸), styledZibang (子邦). Son of Guanqiu Jian, he advised his father to rebel. Guanqiu Dian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
